name: obsidian
description: Bundled Codex workflows for Obsidian knowledge management.

interface.shortDescription: Bundled workflows for working with an Obsidian vault via CLI.
interface.longDescription: A bundled Obsidian plugin for capturing notes, researching across a vault, and curating links between notes using the official Obsidian CLI.
defaultPrompt: Capture this conversation as a clean Obsidian note.
Research this topic across my vault and summarize it.
Suggest backlinks and related notes for this draft.
